name: Bluelearnerhub
description: An intelligent learning platform that personalizes education through structured learning paths, gamified experiences, and real-time progress tracking.

name: FinanceHub
description: A financial management platform currently in the prototype phase. We are focused on building a robust core architecture before unveiling its full capabilities.

name: AI CAD Copilot
description: An AI copilot for CAD that turns natural-language intent into parametric geometry, sketch suggestions, and design-rule checks — built to sit alongside the modeling tools engineers already use.
